acquisition_method: git clone followed by git archive HEAD
release_notes: The pinned repository contains README, LICENSE, raw prompts/model responses, and three expert-specific evaluation CSV files. Despite the README saying dataset and code, this revision contains no analysis code, participant protocol, interview material, or separate rubric document. CSV headers expose the eight rating factors and completion marker. The archive is local evidence; review claims must inspect its files and the immutable paper PDF.
